result:
[[A3]]

to: Dan Marsh <info@example.com>
subject: Good to meet you at the tower

Dan,

Good to meet you at the Coastal Collective exchange. The most useful thing I took from the day was your steer on the agents: sell the experience, leave the pricing to the platform. It has already changed how we introduce Hillside Farm to the hotels. Thank you too for being so open about how Coastal Collective and the booking system have worked for you.

It was only afterwards that I realised I had been talking to Australia's most-awarded small distillery. We are practically neighbours. Hillside Farm sits at the foot of your mountain over at the foothills, and our visitors are the families and couples who would happily add a tasting or a class on Ridgeline while they are in the area. If you are ever happy to point a few our way, we will gladly do the same, and you and the family would be very welcome to come out for a ride and a look around.

Good to meet a fellow hinterland operator who is open about what works. Let us keep in touch.

Sam Tan
Director, Hillside Farm
